title: HOUSE DAY Folding Step Stool 13 inch(33cm) Height Medium Heavy Duty Foldable Stool for Adults, Large Foldable Step Non-Slip Folding Stools Portable Plastic Collapsible Step for Kids - Black
features: 【Premium Quality & Non Slip】-Features a compact and sturdy seamless footrest,provide long-lasting strength and use.Improved product structure and Increase the folding seam position to prevent cracked ,making sure that the maximum load capacity of the folding step can be 300 pounds.Special rubber dots on the surface and anti-slip black rubber strap on each foot for maximum foot grip and gives amazing comfort, preventing slippage.

【Portable Folding Stool】-An extra light model is the Folding Step Stool Chair from Houseday. The clever puzzle-like design allows this particular compact stool to fold up into a low-profile package. Its wide base, non-slip feet and non-slip treads ensure it won't slip or slide when you stand on the stool.

【Space Saving Foldable Stool】-HOUSE DAY Stepping Stool save your closet space more than 90% when it folded up.It's quickly and easily folds away for convenient storage so you can opens with one flip of the hand.Also you can hides them in corner at home because it's so compact.

【Safe Upgrade Kids Stand Stool】-Features improved the folding bar,which can prevent from collapse inward while standing on it.HOUSE DAY have designed a safety stop gap feature that allows the foldable stool to prevent being squashed, great for kids & adults. Four round corner super safe protect your body from clashing. All of this design is put your kids safe first.

【Quality Gurantee】-Keep using quality materials to ensure the best quality. The lightweight plastic is hardy and not prone to rust or decay. It’s perfect for any gardener looking to hunker down with their plants or reach for that extra tall shelf in the garden shed.

【Safety Guidelines】-HOUSE DAY Folding Step Stool is EN 581 certified, we offer a wide range of height sizes (22/27/33/40/46cm) of step stools to choose from. If we need to stand on it to reach a high place, please make sure the stool is fully extended and on a smooth surface. Please note that children under the age of three should not use the stool.
